entry.title: Re: Discover the World of Poultry: From Farm to Fork with E2E Supply chain in SAP S4HANA Private Clo

entry.title: Fiori application Capacity scheduling table not able to see the data
entry.content:
Hi Expert ,

In scope id 3LQ while checking against the work center capacity in the Fiori application Capacity scheduling table not able to see the data after assigning area responsibility but still data not fetching.
please help us on this.

Regards,
Ankit Kumar

entry.title: Re: Synchronise Tasks from Jira to SAP CALM
entry.content:
Hi Quteiba,

You've probably already seen documentation about the External API Management app. The direction of this communication is SAP Cloud ALM -> third party service. We offer generic guides and documentation for integrating the API of a third party service with your SAP Cloud ALM tenant. The flow of events is:

  1. Some kind of an event situation is created (e.g. a metric threshold is passed).
  2. SAP Cloud ALM makes a request to the API of the third party service.
  3. The third party service responds to the API request by performing an action (e.g. creating a task, ticket, etc.).
  4. The third party service sends a JSON payload back to SAP Cloud ALM to inform about the result about the API request and action.

This workflow is configurable in SAP Cloud ALM because the API requests are being created and executed on the SAP Cloud ALM side. 

Let's compare this to communication in the direction of third party service -> SAP Cloud ALM (e.g. Jira -> SAP Cloud ALM). In this scenario, the third party service is going to make API requests to the SAP Cloud ALM APIs. The flow of events is different:

  1. Some action is taken in the third party service (e.g. closing a Jira Task).
  2. The third party service creates and executes a request to one of the SAP Cloud ALM APIs.
  3. SAP Cloud ALM responds to the API request by performing an action (e.g. closing a Task in an SAP Cloud ALM Project).
  4. SAP Cloud ALM sends a JSON payload back to the third party service to inform about the result about the API request and action.

Because the API requests will be created and executed in the third party service, SAP Cloud ALM has no ability to configure or otherwise influence that process. SAP Cloud ALM can only respond and act on the API requests it receives from the third party service. Because of this, there are no guides owned by SAP Cloud ALM specifically for integrating communication in the direction of a third party service -> SAP Cloud ALM. 

However, we do offer extensive documentation for our various Push APIs. Third party services can make requests to these APIs, as long as the third party service supports the ability to execute API requests. We cannot offer specific guidance for configuring third party services to make API requests, but we can assist with errors and issues when our API is being called (e.g. the third party service makes the request, but SAP Cloud ALM responds in an unexpected way).

You mentioned that you want to create/update SAP Cloud ALM Project Tasks when you perform actions on Jira Tasks. I am not a Jira expert, so I cannot speak to its suite of functionality. If Jira does not support the execution of API requests, then you will not be able to configure the worklfow you desire. If Jira does support executing API requests though, you'll need to configure your Jira system to make requests using the SAP Cloud ALM Tasks API. You can create (POST), update (PATCH), and even delete (DELETE) SAP Cloud ALM project Tasks using that API. 

If you want to experiment with the Tasks API, you can check out the SAP Cloud ALM Tasks page on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub. The Try Out page will allow you to perform some tests in a dummy environment, or configure a connection to your SAP Cloud ALM tenant and run actual API requests to manipulate SAP Cloud ALM Project Tasks. You may also need to experiment with the SAP Cloud ALM Project API in order to identify the correct Project data required as part of the Tasks API request JSON body.

Thanks and regards, 
John

entry.title: SAP MM Cerificate selection
entry.content: I’ve completed my SAP MM training using learning materials, but I’m unsure which certification to pursue since SAP has introduced many updates recently. Could someone please guide me on selecting the right SAP certification exam for SAP MM?

entry.title: Re: RAP on Dynamic Condition Tables – Draft Enablement Challenge
entry.content: @FabioPagotiits needed because of the composition we added and Also, we want to update the parent entries based on the child entries

entry.title: Re: Fixed Assets Migration - Asset Value Date and Depreci...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you are doing Asset Data migration during the fiscal year then "Transaction during FY" tab information in Migration file is important. You should use Transaction type 100 for Acquisition and put Value date in the file same as your legacy transfer date i.e. 30/04/2035. This should solve your issue.

Try this, it should work. Check and let me know.

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Returnable packaging owned by us to be used for vendor deliveries
entry.content:
We have a request to set up a process for keeping track of pallets that are in rotation between us and a supplier. The pallets will be owned by us and assumption is that they will managed as VERP materials with a valuation. We need to keep track of how many pallets are in our warehouse and how many are shipped out to the supplier. We will ship initial stock of pallets to the supplier, receive them back from them with their materials on them twice a week, and when the truck does the milk-run they will pick up some pallets and ship them to the supplier to refill the stock at their plant.

Since volume of pallets is low and deliveries only happens twice a week business is prepared to have a simple process with some manual intervention. But ideally we should post the incoming from our vendor automatically and for the outbound process have a delivery w/o reference and a PGI so we can print dispatch note and waybill for the delivery.

 

We have an inbound process where we create inbound delivery and post goods issue with 107 movement type to stock in transit when supplier send the ASN, and as second step we do a 109 movement into stock upon arrival to our plant. As part of creating the inbound delivery upon the ASN we are determining the packaging material from packaging instruction. Here we can include our owned pallet, but not sure how we can control the movement type?

 

Has anyone come across similar requirement and have a solution proposal including which movement types to use?

entry.title: Re: SAP MM Cerificate selection
entry.content: I recommend starting with this one: https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-sap-s-4hana-sourcing-and-procurement

entry.title: Re: PPM Project Procurement integration
entry.content: PRs and POs can be assigned to the "shadow" WBS only PS project for a PPM project.  These can then be managed in CPM.

entry.title: Re: Handling Bank Charges During Incoming Payments in SAP...
entry.content:
Hi,

To book difference in incoming payment to bank charges , you need to do configuration in FBKP - Automatic postings->Bank transactions->Bank charges. Here you need to assign Bank charges GL account.

Once this configuration is done, while doing incoming payment, you can see the bank charges field, just put the bank charges amount in that field. It will automatically post the bank charges to configured GL account.

Example of entry

Bank Incoming account DR 90

Bank Charges account DR 10

              Customer Account CR 100

 

I hope this clears. Please check and confirm.

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: How to monitor the approval workflow for timesheets?
entry.content:
Dear

We have implement the badi to determine the approver for timesheet in our SAP Public Cloud environment (Badi HCM: Timesheet Approver Determination (HCM_CATS_V1_APPROVER_DETRMN)).

Our question is how we can monitor this approval flow from an admin perspective?
- How can we track if the workflow is stuck (eg. failed to derive an agent)?
- Can we see which user need to approve a certain task?
- Can we forward/cancel/... tasks?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: How to test RAP odata V4 custom action?
entry.content: Hi Neil! You're fine - 204 actually means success but without any returning data. Your way of calling it is correct - when we're testing manually, we need to add the namespace.action to our endpoint. Check your action signature on the behaviour definition, you can refer to the input/output parameters here: https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/action-definition?q=actions

entry.title: Re: SAC "Only data of the table that are on the current p...
entry.content:
Hi @Eliram_Lugassi,

Here are the steps to create excel export button

  1. Create script variable

Use left side panel as shown below

 

 

 

 

  1. Select Include widget option and select the table you want to export

 

 

 

  1. Add Button

Write below script on button

 

Application.showBusyIndicator();

 

ExportToExcel_1.exportReport();

 

Application.hideBusyIndicator();

 

Hope this will work for you.

Thanks.

entry.title: Execute "BAPI_BUPA_PFCT_GETFUNCTDETAIL" in RPA
entry.content:
Hi

I am creating automation in iRPA

I am using BAPI SDK

I want to execute BAPI: "BAPI_BUPA_PFCT_GETFUNCTDETAIL"

I get the following error: "Error: BAPI exception : MESSAGE_TYPE_X\n    at a._handleResponse"

I am probably setting "Imports parameters" in wrong way but I have no documentation showing me what exactly should I do.

Do you know what might cause this problem or do you have documentation for this specific BAPI Name?

 

Thank you in advance

Mateusz

entry.title: Re: ML4HMASTER229
entry.content:
Dear berkayilgin,

I can only emphasize what Jeremy already said: please open an incident with SAP as a missing cost component split control record in CKMLKEVLD even after activating scope item 33Q can only be fixed by SAP support.

Thank you.

Best regards
Marvin

entry.title: Play and Pause Functionality in Asset Management
entry.content:
According to the documentation, in SAP S/4HANA Asset Management Public Cloud, the standard process requires entering a start and end date (in Perform Maintenance Jobs App) when technicians recording time, so starting and pausing the work does not affect time recording. My question is whether, from SAP Maintenance Assistant (or any other option), technicians can press play and pause, and the system automatically records the time elapsed between pressing play and pause.

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Database Creation from SAP BTP
entry.content: Thank you for the post. Found it very informative.

entry.title: Re: How to fix time out issues where tracking won't allow...
entry.content: You might want to check out the users' browser setting. Third-Party cookies (AKA cross-site tracking) must be enabled or users will time out after 30 minutes.

entry.title: Re: Add row to table sap sac analytics designer
entry.content:
Hello Nasser
I need the same thing right now. Did you solve this? If so, how did you solve it?

entry.title: ABAP RAP
entry.content: Hello, I have an urgent and important question. I humbly request that you answer it. I have developed an OData service using abap rap. The service works fine in SAP Gateway client, "/IWFND/GW_CLIENT". But when I try to access it in my browser or using Insomnia, etc., I get a timeout error. Onething that may be important is that I'm not within the internal network of the SAP system. What's the problem, and how to solve it? Thanks so much.

entry.title: Need Help Creating a SAP BTP Trial Account
entry.content:
I am trying to learn the SAP Cloud Integration Processing (Integration Suite). As most of the tutorials reference a prerequisite for setting up a trial account. Unfortunately, this has been done for me, but is limited with permissions for creating an Instance for service keys. 

I would like to create a separate trial account where I have the administration privileges to get through the tutorials. 

Warmest regards, 

Roger Huff

SAP Signavio (SAP Signavio Process Manage)

could you please tell me how I can access this components?

thanks and regards, 

Belén

entry.title: Re: How to fix time out issues where tracking won't allow...
entry.content: Thanks - that's a good tip, I'll check out out.

entry.title: Introducing the Get Certified Series for SAP Certified Professional - Developer - SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Are you aiming to become a certified SAP Commerce Cloud developer? Do you want to deepen your understanding of the platform and confidently prepare for the P_C4H34 certification exam? We’re excited to announce a comprehensive Get Certified live session series designed specifically to support you on this journey!

Overview

This series

Get Certified: SAP Certified Professional - Developer - SAP Commerce Cloud

features expert-led knowledge transfer sessions conducted by certified trainers who will guide you through all the key topics necessary to succeed in the P_C4H34: SAP Certified Professional - Developer - SAP Commerce Cloud exam. The goal? To provide you with targeted, instructor-led support that complements your self-study efforts, helping you build confidence and mastery of the exam content.

For registration, simply log in with your valid Learning Hub subscription (for SAP internal teams, it’s FREE) and register to reserve your spot.

Why Attend?

Preparing for certification involves more than just studying on your own. Our live sessions offer:

  • Expert guidance: Learn directly from experienced trainers who understand what’s required to pass.
  • Focused walkthroughs: Dive deep into critical topics and exam question types.
  • Resources and references: Obtain valuable materials to extend your learning after each session.
  • Q&A opportunities: Clarify doubts and get tips for the exam.

Please note, this series is different from the previous live session recording, "Certification Live Session: SAP Commerce Cloud - Developer Certification Preparation" While that session provided a helpful overview of the essential exam topics, it did not delve into each area with detailed explanations, sample questions, or comprehensive coverage.

Our upcoming Get Certified series offers a deeper, more focused approach, with expert-guided walkthroughs of key topics, practical tips, and sample questions designed to maximize your exam readiness.

How to Prepare

Start your certification journey by reviewing the Trainings or Learning Journeys associated with SAP Commerce Cloud listed at the end of this blog post. These will give you a road map of what to learn. Then, participate in our live sessions to receive a structured, guided review of exam content, focusing on the most important areas for success.

Session Breakdown

Here's what we have planned:

Session 1: Kick-Off (1 hour)

  • Introduction to the series and certification
  • Explanation of exam question types and tips on preparation
  • Walkthrough of sample questions using the exam interface

Session 2: Exploring Platform Basics and Platform Features (1.5 hours)

  • Review of core platform concepts
  • Understanding the system architecture and key functionalities essential for the exam

Session 3: Mastering Product Content Management & Commerce (1 hour)

  • Insights into managing product data
  • Managing commerce operations within SAP Commerce Cloud

Session 4: Navigating Customer Experience, Order Management, Customer Services, and Backoffice Framework (1.5 hours)

  • Deep dive into the web content management module (WCMS)
  • Managing orders, customer services, and backoffice functionalities

Session 5: Understanding Commerce Cloud and Cloud Portal, Integration Support and Managing Clean Core (1 hour)

  • Overview of SAP Commerce Cloud (in the public Cloud) and Cloud Portal UI
  • Overview for the integration support of SAP Commerce Cloud
  • How to manage the Clean Core principal in SAP

Learning Objectives

By participating in this series, you will:

  • Gain a clear understanding of the exam structure and scope
  • Cover the essential topic areas required for certification success
  • Build confidence to attempt the P_C4H34 exam with expert guidance and practice

Relevant Learning Journeys

To maximize your preparation(best before attending the get certified series), review the following Trainings or Learning Journeys:

  • Managing Clean Core for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, and 
  • either:
    • SAP Commerce Cloud Developer Part 1
    • SAP Commerce Cloud Developer Part 2
  • or:
    • Exploring the Technical Essentials of SAP Commerce Cloud
    • Expanding upon Technical Essentials of SAP Commerce Cloud
    • Mastering the Technical Essentials of SAP Commerce Cloud

Ready to take your SAP Commerce Cloud skills to the next level and achieve certification? Don’t miss this opportunity to learn from the best, clarify your doubts, and prepare effectively for the P_C4H34 exam. 

See you in July or October! Let’s get certified together!

entry.title: Re: how to add and populate two custom fields in addition...
entry.content: Hi @DominikTylczyn @, Thank you very much for your response. It seems to me after researching that the Badi you have mentioned adds a new tab to add the custom fields rather than adding them in the existing standard fields. Can you please help with this.

entry.title: Re: Add field CustomerAccountAssignmentGroup to API/BO In...
entry.content:
In sales order OData Api, it has field ‘CustomerAccountAssignmentGroup’  ,  in returns order OData API, such field is not exposed.

You can only maintain this value via the UI/App after returns order is created via API.

If you need this field in the API , you can raise a CIP request for this field.

entry.title: Re: P-User is not matching with ANID
entry.content: Ever managed to solve it? Have the same issue now. RFQ from S4 to Ariba works, the Contract being sent from Ariba to S4 works but the contract status back from S4 to Ariba is throwing exactly the same error....

entry.title: Re: Assistance Required – Agent-on-Fly Configuration for...
entry.content: Hi @Vera_Jaing, We are on ECC6 EHP7 with Windows Server 2019 and MS-SQL database environment with Always-On High Availability (HA) enabled. C:\Program Files\SAP\hostctrl\exe\saphostctrl.exe -function GetComputerSystem. On Windows, we have run the above command on the two virtual servers ineccprdci, ineccprddb and attached the outputs and screenshots of diagnostics agent and configuration for your analysis: Hostname FQDN IP address Cluster IP address Host Type ineccprdci ineccprdci.xyz.com 172.X.X.151 192.X.X.151 Virtual (MS-SQL Always-On, High Availability windows failover cluster & SAP Central Instance) ineccprddb ineccprddb.xyz.com 172.X.X.150 192.X.X.150 Virtual (MS-SQL Always-On, High Availability windows failover cluster & SAP Application) ineccsapgrp ineccsapgrp.xyz.com 172.X.X.154 Logical (SAP Message Server Group) ineccdbgrp,1433 ineccdbgrp.xyz.com 172.X.X.153 Logical (Database Listener with Port) infsserver infsserver.xyz.com 172.X.X.152 Logical (Shared Filesystem for SAP HA) ineccapp2–9 ineccapp[2–9].xyz.com 172.X.X.[155-165] Virtual (Application Instances) The expected logical host are listed in the command result and The logical hosts have their own IP addresses mappings. All the IP address with hostnames are mapped in Windows Central DNS server and no local system maintenance of the etc/hosts file. The two virtual servers ineccprdci, ineccprddb shows the Cluster/heartbeat IP address (192.X.X.151, 192.X.X.150) in SAP Diagnostics Agent and same values are replicated in LMDB for them, instead of actual/real IP address (172.X.X.151, 172.X.X.150). Due to Solution Manager unable to reach the Cluster/Heartbeat IP address (192.X.X.151, 192.X.X.150) and metric/alerts triggers host is not available. I have manually set the hostnames with actual/real IP address (172.X.X.151, 172.X.X.150) in Application Configuration Tab at SAP Diagnostics Agent Administration and updated the actual/real IP address (172.X.X.151, 172.X.X.150) manually in LMDB also for two virtual servers ineccprdci, ineccprddb. The Agent-on-Fly functionality has also been activated on both hosts. However, we are encountering the following issues: On ineccprdci, only the logical hostname ineccsapgrp.xyz.com is available for creating the Agent-on-Fly Diagnostics Agent. The logical hostname ineccdbgrp.xyz.com:1433 (used for the database listener) is not listed. On ineccprddb, neither ineccsapgrp.xyz.com nor ineccdbgrp.xyz.com:1433 appear as options for Agent-on-Fly Diagnostics Agent creation. Could you kindly advise on the correct procedure to register and configure the Agent-on-Fly Diagnostics Agent for the logical host ineccdbgrp.xyz.com:1433 on either ineccprdci or ineccprddb? Regards Srinivas V

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content:
@MKreitlein We are aware of the feedback regarding the comment field. We have added this item already to our community feedback list. 

While not quite the same, we can add a new item to the list more specifically to restricting being able to add a comment by hitting enter. Let me know, the list is there to be used 🙂

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content:
@Necronomicon @bjaganathan1 @johnny999 

time-slice content was adjusted meanwhile also for some logistics objects like MM or SD ones. Details can be found here: https://help.sap.com/docs/btc/application-help/time-slice-filtering

entry.title: Re: Manage Spaces and Pages for SAP Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I’ve just stated to build up a business role with Spaces and Pages in our development system using

SAP Stanrard role SAP_FLP_ADMIN (SAP ALL),

Installed Product Versions:

SAP S/4HANA FOUNDATION 2023

SAP FIORI FES 2023 FOR S/4HANA

SAP FIORI FOR SAP S/4HANA 2023

ABAP PLATFORM 2023 (03 (02/2025)

I’m running into issues with App for Managing Pages (ID: F4512).

  1. I created a business role.
  2. I created business catalog and assigned it to the business role.
  3. I created a Space and assigned it to the business role.
  4. I created a Page and assigned it to the space.
  5. While editing the page I have following issues:
    1. Apps can’t be derived from the role
    2. Sections can’t also be added.

In our Sandbox I don’t facing this issue.

Installed Product Versions:

SAP S/4HANA FOUNDATION 2023

SAP FIORI FES 2023 FOR S/4HANA

SAP FIORI FOR SAP S/4HANA 2023

ABAP PLATFORM 2023 (02 (02/2025)

Does anyone have an idea?

Feedback is highly appreciated!

Best Regards and thanks in advance.

Magdalena

entry.title: Re: Selective Data Transition with Time Slice.
entry.content: @RahulUpadhyay thanks the blog, very informative. Please be informed that the time-slice content was extended for other modules such as MM & SD. As in your blog it states FI & CO only. Details can be found here: https://help.sap.com/docs/btc/application-help/time-slice-filtering

entry.title: How to calculate continuous employment days in Story Reports based on Job Information records
entry.content:
Hi,
I’m trying to create a Story report in SuccessFactors that calculates whether an employee has a continuous period of employment based on Job Information records.

Here’s the logic I want to apply:

  • If the current employment is Active, it should be included in the calculation.
  • If the previous record is Inactive (e.g., due to Termination), it should not be counted as part of the continuous period.
  • However, if the break (gap) between two Active periods is less than or equal to one month, it should be considered continuous.
  • The goal is to mark employees as having “Yes” for continuous employment if the total days of this continuous period is 180 days or more.

Here’s an example:

Filip’s Job History:

StartDate

EndDate

Employee Status

2024-01-01

2024-01-31

Active

2023-11-01

2023-12-31

Inactive

2023-10-01

2023-10-30

Active

2023-09-01

2023-09-30

Active

In this case:

  • The period from 2024-01-01 to 2025-05-28 is Active.
  • The prior record is Inactive (2023-11-01 to 2023-12-31) — this should not be counted.
  • The records before that (Sep and Oct 2023) are Active and close together — they should be considered part of the same continuous period.
  • Because the gap (Inactive) is more than 1 month, the previous period is not connected to the current one.

Kalle’s Job History:

StartDate

EndDate

Employee Status

2024-01-01

2025-05-27

Active

2023-12-01

2023-12-31

Inactive

2023-11-01

2023-11-30

Active

2023-10-01

2023-10-30

Active

In this case, the gap is one mothn and the employe should  be included and the total days is 180 days.

 

Question:
How can I structure a calculated column or use available functions in Story Reports (People Analytics) to compute continuous working days according to this logic?

Is there a recommended way to loop through records or compare start/end dates and statuses in Story Reports?

I need guidance on how to compare records with each other.

Thanks in advance for any help or guidance!

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content:
Hello @AnnePetteroe 

I think your item is enough. When the full editor is available, the also the "Enter"-topic is solved.

Thanks, Martin

entry.title: 📢 Important Update: New Support Components for SAP Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
We’ve introduced a new and improved list of components for customers to select when creating support tickets for the SAP Central Business Configuration  team. This change is designed to make your support experience more efficient, accurate, and aligned with the evolving structure of SAP Central Business Configuration services.

🧭 Why This Change?

As SAP Central Business Configuration continues to grow and evolve, so do the services and technologies we support. The previous component structure no longer reflected the full scope of our offerings, which sometimes led to delays in routing tickets to the right experts.

With the new component list, we’ve:

  • Introduced more granular and descriptive components to better reflect specific areas of support.
  • Aligned component names with current CBC architecture and terminology.
  • Improved ticket routing to ensure faster and more accurate support.

🆕What’s New?

Here’s a quick overview of the changes:

New Component

Component Name

Old Component

CBC-AIX

AI-Assisted Scoping and Configuration Services

New component

CBC-AS-TBA

Template-Based Authoring

New component

CBC-CCX-AIX

SAP Central Customer Experience, AI-Assisted Services

New component

CBC-AOB-CCP

Customer Conversion to SAP CBC

X4-CBC-CCP

CBC-BCL

Runtime & Lifecycle Services

X4-CBC-BCL

CBC-BCL-PL

Parallel Line

New component

CBC-BOS

Business Oriented Scoping

New component

CBC-BOS-ANS

Add New Scenarios (Scope Items)

CBC-BOS-ANS

CBC-BOS-BAC

Business Adaptation Catalog

X4-CBC-BAC

CBC-BOS-CORE

Business Oriented Scoping - Core Services

X4-CBC-CORE

CBC-BOS-UI

Scoping User Interface

X4-CBC-PRX-SCP

CBC-CCX

Central Customer Experience

X4-CBC-PRX

CBC-CCX-DEP

Deployment Target App in Customer Experience

X4-CBC-PRX-DEP

CBC-CCX-LOG

Change Logs

X4-CBC-LOG

CBC-CCX-SYS

System Tab in Central Experience

X4-CBC-PRX-SYS

CBC-CCX-TEM

Teams Tab in Customer Experience

X4-CBC-PRX-TEM

CBC-CFG

Configuration Management

X4-CBC-FT

CBC-CFG-ACT

Configuration Activities

X4-CBC-SSC, X4-CBC-FT

CBC-CFG-BSC

Configuration BackSync

New component

CBC-CFG-UI

Configuration User Interface

New component

CBC-ORG

Organizational Structure

X4-CBC-ORG

CBC-ORG-APP

Organizational Structure App

X4-CBC-ORG-APP

CBC-SRV-OPS

Cloud Operations Support

X4-CBC-SRV

CBC-UAT

User Authentication and Authorization

X4-CBC-BAF-UAT, BAF-UAT

✅What You Need to Do

When creating a support ticket for SAP Central Business Configuration team,  please make sure to select the new component that best matches your issue. This ensures your request is routed to the right team without delay.

💡Need Help Choosing the Right Component?

If you're unsure which component to select, our support portal includes updated descriptions and guidance. You can also reach out to our support team for assistance and any new components made available will be added to our KBA 3594047 - SAP Central Business Configuration new component list.

We appreciate your cooperation and look forward to continuing to support your success with SAP Central Business Configuration.

Thanks,

Kelly & Costi Oprisor

entry.title: Re: OS Requirements for Installation of SAP on DB2 11.1?
entry.content:
Db2 11.1 OS Requirements are outlined in the Db2 11.1 upgrade guide: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/DB6/3dc847a6348c431baf0c09ff4ad282a7/c31c5e75dbc14d3690daaade28aba616.html?version=11_1

entry.title: Intercompany project accruals
entry.content:
I  have an issue with project accounting and reporting from projects. The problem is related to large co-operation projects that are global in nature and use resources, expenses, and revenue intercompany e.g. project owned by Brazilian company code is contributed to by companies in US/Europe/Africa.

We are able to post time writing, travel expense costs, and services (which include markup for travel expenses) for intercompany. 
Where we have a problem is the accruals & deferrals of cost/revenue from the supplying companies. It is not supported by SAP to post accruals in the supplying companies towards an intercompany project. Revenue recognition in SAP only posts on the project in the company code which owns the project.
 
This means we are unable to post accruals or deferrals across the companies to the global projects which results to not being able to show correct numbers in reporting for contributions per company to the global projects and the total margins after eliminating internal costs with internal revenue. Any suggestions for this issue?

entry.title: Re: Adding Pricing Conditions to an Existing Purchasing I...
entry.content:
Hi, I think you are using wrong API URL. Use the below one.

https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4hanacloud/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_INFORECORD_PROCESS_SRV/A_PurInfoRecdPrcgCndn(%271234%27)

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Management Layer for SAP S/4HANA – What’s New – Release 2023
entry.content:
Hi Xavier,

Thanks for the reply . I have few question.  Could you please help me with

1. Is there any way to check in the system and identify which EML version has been deployed

2. Can I have Lower EML version in a Higher S4HANA system .. For example can a S4HANA 2022 FPS02 system have EML 2021 version?

3. If we plan for a upgrade , what will be the strategy to adopt new EML version.. is it something like we need to order for a Sandbox system where EML image will be deployed , then we need to move the configuration either manually or using BC sets to Dev environment and from there to other system..

Could you please guide me on what will be the process that we need to follow if I upgrade my system to S4HANA 2023 and want EML version 2023 through out the landscape.

Thanks

Bikram

entry.title: Re: Question about SAP Business One Additional Expense
entry.content:
Dear @mMason1 , 

Please press the "Freight - Setup" button shown next to the checkbox.

The following window appears, and here you can define the expenses:

Once creating documents, e.g. Delivery, the Freight charges can be added in line level via dedicated columns (add to the doc table via "Form Settings")

And in document level, using this dialog: 

Good luck, 

Maya

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content: @matthiasstegmue   Thank you so much ... we are scoping potential customers for our POC, and I was waiting for that

entry.title: Build Process Automation get workflow instances from shared environment
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm trying to get the workflow instances that are running in a shared environment in build process automation from Postman.

If I try to get them from the public environment I get a list of the running instances, but from the shared environment I get a 200 OK with an empty list. 

I put the environmentId as query parameter and irpa-api-key as header and configured the authorization. I'm able to activate a process in a shared environment from Postman, so I know those settings are correct.

I also made sure that there are running instances in the shared environment.

Does anyone know where the problem lies?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: A learning item is still in the section for you today...
entry.content: Hi, this was solved? I mean what happens if I have more than one user affected? It is not so feasible if there are many cases, is there something massive or does not depend on creating a ticket with SAP support?

sftp is source having csv 10 records and target must be 10 different idoc customers in s4 hana. How can we acheive this

 

Regards,

Satish

entry.title: Re: Linking Documentation to Start and End Page

entry.title: Missing SAP Service and Asset Manager files to download in SAP for Me
entry.content:
Hi! 

I need to download the SAP Service and Asset Manager files and MDK to debug some issues. But i couldn't find the documments in Download center. 

I follow this steps, but couldn't find.

Search By Category → SAP Mobile Solutions → SAP SERVICE AND ASSET MANAGER → MDK PLUG-IN SDK.

Best Regards, 

Rafael Eij Umeda

SAP Service and Asset Manager

entry.title: Re: SAP ByD - confirm inbound warehouse task with sales k...
entry.content:
Check your payload.

For me , the problem was that i didn't specify the TimeZone code in the ActualDeliveryDate node.

entry.title: Re: How to update the records in Resubmission/Notes – UDM_RSM_ATTR table
entry.content:
Great post.👍
I have also encountered such a requirement. Additionally, it has been requested to display notes in a report at a later stage for all resubmissions. Since the notes are stored as text objects, we have used the following approach:

  1. Retrieved the GUID from the table UDM_RSM_ATTR.

  2. Passed the GUID to the function module "SELECT_TEXT" with Object = "UDM_RSM" and NAME = "GUID*".

  3. Imported the received TEXT to the function module "READ_TEXT" with Object = "UDM_RSM", ID = "0001", and Name = "<fetched text name>" from step 2.

entry.title: Re: Please help!! Erro "env.supportRelativePaths" when building web version
entry.content:
Man You should be canonized!!

I've been trying to figure it out for over a month, you save me!! Appreciate a lot for the help!!

I've just uninstalled the map component and it worked!!

entry.title: Re: Can Ariba send POs to Non-enabled suppliers via Email...
entry.content: @cCalvin_W - Even when suppliers are considered as Non-enabled, they receive other emails from Ariba regarding changes in invoice status or other Ariba related notifications. Are you able to disable these notifications? We have suppliers who do not want to enroll on Ariba Network but due to quick enablement, they receive email notifications, which becomes annoying.

entry.title: Limit sales order partner function number - taken only from customer
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I've got a question regarding Partner functions: I want to limit the partner function number possible list to be taken from customer.

Example partner function CP - contact person. Current setting (I've added origin E, but it's not working as I thought, previously it was empty):

Currently I only have 1 contact person assigned to this customer:

And this number is assigned as default to the sales order in order header -> partner tab:

Yet I can go and change this number to another one and save such sales order:

Is there a standard configuration to block such action and allow only numbers that are assigned to the customer?

entry.title: Universal Journal Import - Cannot Run UJ Task in Period 13
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I am setting up the UJ release universal docs integration and see that in period 13 the data monitor does not show that the UJ task is available – for the relevant CU - showing as “-“.
In period 12 for example, I reset the monitor andi the relevant CU showed the task as available (X).
We setup GRPL, all CUs have a fiscal year variant as K4 – both in Financials and the GR version has a K4 linked to it (OB29 shows 12 periods + 4).
The integration was setup so that in both the CU master data and another Data monitor period (12 as above the task is available).
When I reset the data monitor there’s no change for period 13.
What can be the problem?

We are using SAP 2023 OP FPL1 (in the process of migrating EC-CS to GR).

Regards,
Eyal

entry.title: Re: Can OpenSSL in Crystal Reports 2025 be an install opt...

Hi Gerald,

I forwarded your request off to the Product owner for comment...

It may take a few days for an update.

Don

entry.title: Testing End-to-End Processes Using Sequences
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP Cloud ALM now allows the use of so-called test sequences to control the order of test cases and organize them into an orderly sequence. In this article, I will demonstrate how this feature can be used.

Added Value of Sequences

Sequences offer several advantages:

  • A defined order for the sequence of steps/test cases
  • Clearly defined number of test cases per sequence
  • Control of responsibilities
  • Improved preparation and planning
  • Monitoring and tracking of progress

Using Sequences

In Test Plan Management, a sequence can be defined and removed as follows:

Sequence during Test Execution

When executing test cases, users can display the sequence and execute the test cases accordingly:

Conclusion

The sequence function in SAP Cloud ALM is a helpful new feature that creates transparency in the preparation, execution, and evaluation of end-to-end processes and test cases.

Further information on project management and test management:

  • Using test plans in SAP Cloud ALM: LINK
  • Project management with SAP Cloud ALM: LINK
  • Modeling end-to-end business processes: LINK

entry.title: Re: Top 10 SAP Cloud ALM News May 2025
entry.content: Excellent News, Thank you marbeth_chavezw

entry.title: MDG Mass Processing Address Usage Error
entry.content:
Hi,

We are upgrading our MDG system version to S/4 HANA 2023 and we've encountered a problem during the mass processing of Business Partner.

We have understood that the entity BP_ADDUSG has been replaced by BP_ADUSTD in the data model. Currently, both entities are active in our system. In the UI, the new entity BP_ADUSTD is correctly populated and displayed.

However, when we import data using the Excel file in a consolidation/mass process scenario, the system still writes data to the old entity BP_ADDUSG. As a result, after the Change Request is created, we do not see the data in the expected section, and we encounter an error due to the absence of the required data.

Additionally, we receive a warning message indicating that an obsolete method is being called, likely triggered after the data is written to BP_ADDUSG.

Our main question is:
How can we ensure that the data is written to the correct entity, BP_ADUSTD?
Is there a specific mapping or customizing setting that allows us to control this behavior?

Even when values are not explicitly provided in the input file, the system continues to derive and populate the old entity as it did prior to the upgrade. We suspect this behavior may be linked to the mass processing logic or data import framework (Excel/Web Service), which might still reference the old entity.

Any guidance or documentation you can provide to help us correctly redirect the data to BP_ADUSTD would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Fiori Change Document Reuse Component not found after Deployment in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: how does your ui5.yaml file look like?

entry.title: How to Restrict Access in SAP Fiori Screen Maintenance Request App
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community

I am working in S/4HANA with the SAP Fiori app Screen Maintenance Request in the Plant Maintenance Module

I want to:
1. Allow some users full access (accept, reject, edit work orders)
2. Allow other users only view access (they can see the request but buttons like Accept/Reject should be greyed out)

I am using role SAP_BR_MAINT_SUPERVISOR as the main role with full access.

How do I make sure the buttons (Accept/Reject) are greyed out for display-only users?

Any documentation links, screenshots, or step-by-step help would be highly appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP
entry.content: if you are not in their network, how can you access???

entry.title: Re: Export and Import Feature of SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
Hi @ayushi - You need to input a Unique Identifier in the import file as this external id will be utilized within the TIH for Attribute-Tag mapping, Growth Portfolio - User to Skill mapping etc. So, the better you organize while creating attributes, the better it is while mapping them within TIH.

Thanks

Ujjal

entry.title: Clarification on Advanced Credit
entry.content:
Dear Team,


We intend to activate the Advanced Credit Management feature in our SAP system. We would like to confirm whether, after activation, it will be possible for End users to create credit limit Request.


This clarification is important, as we expect the credit limit requests to be generated directly by end users as part of their standard process.


Kindly provide your inputs or any prerequisites related to this.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Clarification on Advanced Credit
entry.content: Scope item 1QM (Advanced Credit Management) needs to be activated to be able to create a credit limit request using the app Manage Credit Limit Requests. You can refer to the SAP Help Portal Creating a Credit Limit Request

entry.title: Users are unable to access their courses in the App.
entry.content:
Varios usuarios han presentado el mismo error al ingresar a un programa de estudios, estos no logran ingresar ya que el sistema genera el siguiente aviso: "SAP SuccessFactors Mobile continúa fallando" (dejo imagen de referencia)

I hope you can help me, thank you!

entry.title: Re: No Currency Pair is defined for currencies
entry.content:
Hola Gabor5!

The configuration activity 101026 exists in CBC

If the ID is not visible for you, please confirm the Scope item J78 it is activated, and your user must have business roles mentioned in that scope item.

Follow the next steps to maintain the exchange rate pairs:

1.- Define the exchange rate pair in the Configuration ID 101026 - Define Leading Currency

2.- Define the Translation ratio for the Exchange rate type you need in the Configuration ID 102568 - Define Translation Ratios for Currency Translation

3.- Confirm or create the quotation for the Currency Pair in the Configuration ID 102611 - Define Standard Quotation for Exchange Rates

4.- Maintain the Exchange rate in the Currency Exchange Rate app.

I hope you find this helpful information and that it helps you resolve the error.

Best regards

Edna

entry.title: Re: /IRM/GPR01 MESSAGE_TYPE_X SHORT DUMP
entry.content: Hi, how did you identify that was bad data?

Hello Experts,

 

what is the easiest way to change the column width in a Fiori Elements app? In BAS there is a function to change the column width, but it does not seem to adjust it.

regards,

Lars

entry.title: S3 Adapter configuration
entry.content:
Hello Team,


 


We are in the process of reading files placed on the S3 Bucket & trying to perform the following steps:


 


Go to the Data Services Management Console.
Navigate to Administrator > Adapters.
Add and configure the Amazon S3 Adapter with your AWS credentials.


 


But there is no S3 Adapter available in the list of Adapters. Could you please check & let us know why it is missing from BODS 14.3,3 version ? .Also what are the other available options to mount it ? Our Server is on SAP RISE.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: S3 Adapter configuration
entry.content:
Hello Deepthy,

My name is Denise and this case has been assigned to me.  I hope this message finds you well!

We don't have an adapter for connecting to Amazon S3 - you need to use a file location or you can use the direct functions to copy data - see the following in the documentation -

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATA_SERVICES/e54136ab6a4a43e6a370265bf0a2d744/e1ed075446344b5ca098e2382cfca78d.html?locale=en-US

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATA_SERVICES/e54136ab6a4a43e6a370265bf0a2d744/a611106693ea422eb0b04705298516b7.html?locale=en-US

 

Best Regards,
Denise
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: BW: Parallel process not use BTC job of SM50 ?
entry.content: Very helpful and detailed answer. Thanks a lot.

entry.content:
Hi @everlynmf 

Based on your screenshots (where the yellow arrow goes back to 1/1 with the latest salary) this will work for you:

 

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Recycle Bin Does Not Show All Records, Shows Blank Pages
entry.content:
I have an issue where the Recycle Bin is not showing all records, but the "Total" still shows correct. Additionally, when deleting items from the Recycle Bin, not all the rows show up as they should (ex, expecting 500 and only showing 458, 498, or another number). As a result, the Recycle Bin has many blank pages. After 30 days, the older items do "fall off" as expected, but there are currently 11,032 items in the bin, 48 of which can be seen over 23 pages.

The background: 

I'm working through an issue with a 3rd party software creating errors on the Promotion Management for backups. Due to this issue we have to clean out the Promotion Management frequently which fills up the Recycle Bin (about 20 pages of 500 records each day).

These items are deleted from Promotion Management and go to the Recycle Bin. When cleaning the Recycle Bin, there are "gaps" of multiple pages (at 50 per page) where there are not 50 on a page or are blank.

In the process of clearing the records, I discovered that the Recycle Bin pages do not populate the "Maximum number of objects per page" from the "Preferences." I have mine set to 500 per page, but any number of records show (ex, 500, 498, 458, etc). As a result, these objects are not deleted. When paging through the Recycle Bin, it's as if these items do reflect in the paging and the "Total".

Currently, there are 11,032 objects in the Recycle Bin, 23 pages (at 500 per page), and only 48 objects show on those pages (13 pages have nothing on them).  Roughly 375 items are "hidden" each day of the approximately 10,000 Promotion Management objects deleted.

Using QueryBuilder (query below), I can see the individual records. I do not see any difference between a record that is visible and a record that does not display.

SELECT TOP 20000 SI_NAME, SI_CREATION_TIME
FROM CI_INFOOBJECTS
WHERE SI_KIND='recyclebin'

While these items do fall off after 30 days, it makes it difficult to identify and restore actual files that are relevant. We get a request to restore something roughly every other week. Because of this, we can't use the "Empty Recycle Bin" option to see if that clears the backlog. Even if it does clear, the "hidden" records likely will still display until our base issue is corrected.

Is there a way to ensure that the Recycle Bin displays the full 500 per page? I have tried many different approaches to deleting records, but this still continues to happen. Additionally, the page shows the same amount of records even with a refresh and logging out and navigating to the page.

Is there a way to resolve the 10,984 "missing" records?

entry.title: Recurrence process in Convergent Charging
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I have a question for you.

Is it possible to disable the automatic execution of Recurring Rates when sending a consumption with a date/time higher than that configured in the Recurring Rate? I know the configuration in the cockpit to completely disable daily ACTIVATION events, but I would like to know if there is any way to keep it active (to normally execute the Recurring Rates), but if I send a consumption it does not execute it automatically?

I don't know if my question is clear, but I can send more details of the complete scenario if necessary. Thank you in advance.

Hey Tamas, is it possible to use the SAP Fiori Font (72) with SAP Screen Personas? I saw it on the OpenSAP course S4HANA Cloud, but it seems like we need to upload something first in the resources tab, can you give me a hand with that? Which SAP Font do we need to download?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: HTTP status code 428 - HTTP Patch call to odata - SAP CPI
entry.content: yes, I added above If-Match header a value as * and Content-Type as application/json. I successfuly update the SalesOrder API through Patch . Thanks

entry.title: Re: Project Glow: New Design Coming to SAP Community on Monday, June 2
entry.content:
I am getting prompted to Renew your SAP SuccessFactors HCM suite Single Sign-On certificate before June 2, 2025 to avoid login issues.

How do I go about doing that?

entry.title: Parallel universes: the dual nature of UX and AI among SAP customers at Sapphire 2025
entry.content:
Sapphire 2025 was interesting and revealing. In the keynotes, theater sessions, and ASUG breakouts, SAP experts and executives talked about the latest innovations around artificial intelligence (AI), data, and user experience (UX). The customer questions and survey responses, however, revealed a parallel universe. Many organizations are on such old systems that they are not able to consume SAP’s cool new functionality. In this post, I will discuss some of my observations, based on conversations with customers and partners, and share some polling I did in one of my sessions on the intersection between SAP Fiori and AI. I will also include links to several slide decks, recorded demos, and on-demand sessions where you can dive deeper into UX and AI topics.

Customers are starting to use AI, but still behind on SAP Fiori UX adoption

In ERP1612, “Enhancing User Experience with SAP Fiori and AI”, I asked the audience of around 120 people how they are using AI in their companies. 96 people responded.

 

The 56% percent of the people who are using AI in some way is a big jump from the 37% who responded at ASUG Tech Connect last fall. The main topic in both sessions was SAP Fiori, so the audience profile should be somewhat similar, although the Tech Connect attendees might be more technical as opposed to the business focus at Sapphire.

View the slides from ERP1612.

https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/embed_code/key/1T0gHqRT6X9ddr?hostedIn=slideshare&page=upload

The central theme was SAP Fiori, so it made sense to level set on where people are on their adoption journey. My expectations were high since SAP Fiori has been available since 2013. Since then, our team has spent many hours talking to 1000s of customers and partners about building SAP Fiori apps and how to streamline the process using our tools and technologies such as SAP Fiori elements, SAP Fiori tools, and new AI accelerators.

But, the reality was very different. Only 9 of 109 respondents are using SAP Fiori across their organizations. 43% are still in the planning stage.

 

 

To help customers move to SAP Business Suite, we had many sessions. One that’s available on demand is “Embark on a successful transformation journey to SAP Business Suite,” featuring Maura Hameroff, Priyadarsana Panda, and Soeren Ruder.

Arpan Shah describes how SAP Business Suite drives transformational value through the suite’s strength and software-as-a-service qualities with integrated processes, data, and AI in the on-demand session “Leverage the benefits of SAP Business Suite in your cloud strategy.”

There were some nice demos of the latest SAP user experience in “SAP's user experience strategy to achieve better outcomes” by Arin Bhowmik and Emil Voutta.

Tom Reiss also had some great sessions on SAP Fiori innovations with nice demos, but unfortunately, they were not recorded.

AI in SAP Cloud ERP wowed the crowd

In Chris Hoffmann’s session, BAI1362, which I heard several people say was the best talk of the entire Sapphire, he showed several key innovations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Here are the slides and demos from his presentation:

  • Slides in PDF format
  • Insights card creation with Joule
  • AI-assisted easy filter
  • AI-assisted smart summarization
  • AI-assisted error explanation
  • AI-assisted smart solution for situations in My Home
  • SAP Fiori elements Project Accelerator

Several executives from SAP and our customers discussed how AI is transforming business. See their session “Harness the benefits of data and AI in ERP and drive innovation” on demand.

For a bigger picture view on where these AI innovations fit into the broader SAP Business Suite, watch “Transform your enterprise with the power of SAP Business Suite.”

SAP Sapphire is a great place for discovery

The new (to SAP) harmonized product operating model focuses on discovery. Interacting with customers to understand their needs plays a big role for product managers and everyone involved in the development process. Sapphire and the after-hours events provide a great venue for conversations with customers about the problems they want to solve.

Since I’m known for my interest in user experience topics, most of my meetings and questions in my sessions focused on UX and adjacent topics. One of my goals was to gather feedback on what we show and address questions about what people need. While people seemed to like the new AI functionality in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition that Chris and I showed in our respective sessions, the most common question was when it is coming to private cloud (planned) and on-prem (not planned).

There were several sessions on organizational change management, which seemed to be one of the main reasons that people have not migrated off the SAP GUI, even though they like to complain about it. Some of the main takeaways from the OCM panel were:

  • Prioritize people not technology
  • Change management takes a toll on people – prep for the after.
  • Don’t lose sight of the goal and decommission the old technology. Make sure to listen and be agile.
  • The journey will be difficult, acknowledge this and over-communicate.

I really enjoyed Paul Saunders’ entertaining and informative sessions on “Leveraging dark data for enhanced decision-making” and “Antifragile enterprises: How true resilience comes from embracing change.” These too were not recorded.

Too much content; too little time

Content overload was a common theme I heard from many of the people I spoke with at Sapphire. There were so many sessions crammed into the compressed 2-day format (compared to three days in years past).

BTP remained a hot topic, with many people looking to understand the best way to obtain value.

Discover SAP Business Technology Platform and its value for your business is a good overview on this.

Another good BTP session is “Unleash the power of your applications, data, and AI with SAP BTP.”

AI everywhere – separating reality from hype

AI was top of mind for everyone as it played such a major role in the keynotes. The most common issues that people raised with me were:

  • Concerns about privacy of their data
  • How much of the capability is real and can the results be trusted?
  • Availability of AI functionality outside of SAP Cloud ERP and the associated costs

SAP Sapphire is all about the people

It was great to meet several colleagues in person for the first time and to connect with those that I see only a few times each year.

If we did not meet at Sapphire and you are interested in joining the conversation about SAP Fiori application development and how AI makes it better, faster, and cheaper, please join our monthly SAP Fiori development roundtable group or sign up for our bi-monthly newsletter.

For the UX Foundation team, Peter Spielvogel.

entry.title: Re: #SITREC2025 - 🗣️IA no Ecossistema SAP: Inovação, Eficiência e o Futuro da Gestão Empresarial
entry.content: Foi top!

entry.title: Using standard plans and "Generative AI hub" menu is still missing.

In my Global Account I have the following entitlements:

In my subaccount:

Used the boosters to create all. In my "Instances and Subscriptions":

Have all required rolls assigned to my user:

But the AI Launchpad doesn't show the "Generative AI Hub" menu:

Not sure if related, but also the "Scenarios" under "ML Operations" are empty.

Any suggestions?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: BPMN Diagrams in SolMan 7.2 - Unexplored - Part1
entry.content:
Hi @VigneshPrabhu99 
can you provide editor link

entry.title: SAP Payroll CFDI EDICOM Mexico (Change Parameter Request Content-Type)
entry.content:
Hello, thank you in advance for the support provided.

Currently, there is a web service configured.

This web service is responsible for stamping the payroll CFDIs generated in the system.So far, we have no issues; the process works correctly.However, the web service provider (EDICOM) has requested to change the content-type parameter of the request, as it is currently sent as "application/soap+xml" and the new request is for this parameter to be "application/xml" or "text/xml".

I have checked some places where there is configuration related to the web service, but I still have not succeeded.I reviewed the web service configuration in SOAMANGER, SE80>Enterprise. 

Do you have any idea where this parameter could be configured?Thank you and enjoy your day.

entry.title: Re: Fondo de ahorro MX, devolución del descuento en retro por faltas/incapacidades
entry.content:
Hola Rogelio, buen dia.

Tenemos el mismo problema, ¿pudiste resolverlo? ¿cómo?

entry.title: Re: Unable to get the Objective library option while addi...
entry.content:
Hi Vasu,

We need to tag the goal library to the goal plan for us to get the option of Creating the goal from the goal library. Below is the code snippet that you can add in your goal plan XML to achieve the requirement.

The id is the GUID that you provide while creating the goal library.

 

<obj-library name="TEST Goal Library" id="10001">
<field-mapping src-library-field-id="Data1" dst-field-id="metric"/>
<field-mapping src-library-field-id="Name" dst-field-id="name"/>
</obj-library>

entry.title: Structured Goal Plan with Goals under Category and Metrics.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement to structure the Goal Plan in Successfactors in the below format:

  1. 1st Level is to have the Category (Customer,Stakeholder)
  2. 2nd Level is to have the Metrics which is dynamic based on the functions and can change for different employees.
  3. Add the Goal so that it shows under the specific metric.

The Goal Alignment feature also doesn't help in achieving this requirement.

Can you please confirm if this is achievable in Successfactors as a structure in the Goal form or Goal Plan.

Also, can we have a concept of a parent goal and a sub-goal under that.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Pong Game - A Fun Fusion of Custom Widgets and Standard Functionalities
entry.content:
But will it run Crysis?

 

 

 

 

Nice Job lol

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for May - ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Escape done thanks to #ABAPcloud !!!

I really enjoyed this May Challenge, thanks @sheenamk for all your effort to motivate the community to learn with fun activities.
